channel.title: Projects on John Westbroek
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on John Westbroek

item.title: Duikboot (PC)
item.description: Lenovo ThinkCentre M700 SFF Duikboot is a compact, no-nonsense workstation built from a refurbished Lenovo ThinkCentre M700 Small Form Factor. What it lacks in size, it makes up for in reliability and quiet persistence. Designed for labbing, coding, retro gaming, and system tinkering, it serves as a stable and efficient daily companion. This machine reflects a philosophy: practical, durable, and adaptable. Not cutting-edge, but thoughtfully upgraded and purpose-driven. Specifications Model

item.title: Website
item.description: ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ TAG CHEAT SHEET ║ ╠═══════════════════╦═══════════════════════╣ ║ MAIN TAGS ║ DETAIL TAGS ║ ╠═══════════════════╬═══════════════════════╣ ║ developing ║ essay ║ ║ writing ║ documentation ║ ║ computing ║ notes ║ ║ gaming ║ list ║ ║ illustration ║ research ║ ║ philosophy ║ experiment ║ ║ profile ║ code ║ ║ ║ wip ║ ║ ║ hardware ║ ║ ║ software ║ ║ ║ tools ║ ║ ║ media ║ ║ ║ retro ║ ╚═══════════════════╩═══════════════════════╝ Folder (3-letter) Long name / purpose Example tags inside Notes LIB Library writing, essay, documentation, notes, manual All text-based content, essays, manuals, and general reading material.
